# protonpass_item_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass SSH key item. Generates a new SSH key pair.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_item_ssh_key" "example" {
  share_id = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  title    = "Key"
  key_type = "ed25519"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String)
- `title` (String)

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment for the SSH key.
- `key_type` (String) Type of SSH key: ed25519, rsa2048, rsa4096. Default: ed25519.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String)
- `item_id` (String)
- `modify_time` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# SSH Key items can be imported by specifying the share ID and item ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_item_ssh_key.example "share_id:item_id"
```
